name: Harmon Spotify
description: Standalone Spotify provider pack for OAuth, cookie import, catalog reads, device control, and Harmon session seeding.

notes: I keep Spotify tokens and imported cookies on the local filesystem.
I do not sync secret state unless another runtime copies these files.

env.name: SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID
env.description: Spotify OAuth client ID. Required for PKCE login and refresh flows.

env.name: SPOTIFY_REDIRECT_URI
env.description: Local PKCE callback URL used by npm run auth.

env.name: SPOTIFY_OAUTH_SCOPES
env.default: user-read-playback-state user-modify-playback-state user-read-currently-playing playlist-read-private playlist-read-collaborative user-read-recently-played user-library-read user-top-read
env.description: Space-delimited OAuth scopes requested during Spotify login.

env.name: SPOTIFY_COOKIES_PATH
env.description: Path to a JSON cookie export that contains Spotify cookies.

env.name: SPOTIFY_SP_DC
env.description: Optional direct cookie import for web-player auth bootstrap.

env.name: SPOTIFY_SP_KEY
env.description: Optional companion cookie for direct Spotify cookie bootstrap.

notes: I support both OAuth tokens and imported web cookies.
Cookie mode is useful for local automation, but OAuth remains the preferred stable path.
